CREATE TABLE test_hilbert (dim1 UInt32, dim2 UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY dim1;
SELECT hilbertEncode(1, 2) AS code1, hilbertEncode(3, 4) AS code2 FROM test_hilbert;
CREATE TABLE second_table (a UInt32, b UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
SELECT hilbertEncode(SELECT a, b FROM second_table WHERE a < 5) FROM test_hilbert;
WITH (SELECT MAX(dim1) FROM test_hilbert) AS max_dim1, (SELECT MAX(dim2) FROM test_hilbert) AS max_dim2 SELECT hilbertEncode(max_dim1, max_dim2);
SELECT hilbertEncode(dim1, dim2), hilbertEncode(dim2, dim1) FROM test_hilbert WHERE dim1 = dim2;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_hilbert) AS count_records SELECT hilbertEncode(count_records, 0);
SELECT hilbertEncode(t1.dim1, t2.dim2) FROM (SELECT dim1 FROM test_hilbert) AS t1, (SELECT dim2 FROM second_table) AS t2;
CREATE TABLE hilbert_data AS SELECT dim1, dim2 FROM test_hilbert WHERE dim1 IS NOT NULL AND dim2 IS NOT NULL;
